word: H798 - אַשְׁדֹּות הַפִּסְגָּה - ʼAshdôwth hap-Piçgâh - ash-doth' hap-pisgaw' - Ashdoth-pisgah

sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁדּות הפּסגּה

Transliteration: 'ashdôth happisgâh

Phonetic: ash-doth' hap-pis-gaw'

BDB Definition:

Ashdoth-pisgah = "slopes of Pisgah"
  1. the mountains of Pisgah, which include Mt. Nebo

Origin: from the plural of H794 and H6449 with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
